issue: passing_scores(scores, threshold) should return every score that meets OR EXCEEDS the threshold, but a score exactly equal to the threshold is being dropped. For example with threshold 60, a score of 60 is a pass yet the function leaves it out; passing_scores([60], 60) returns [] instead of [60]. Scores strictly above the threshold are kept correctly and scores below it are correctly dropped -- only the equal-to-threshold boundary is handled wrong.
